subject: NOTICE Yakima County Superior Court Filing Deadline Hoffman Organics LLC vs Peters Farms
snippet: Filing deadline Sunday October 25 2026 at 11 59 PM Pacific Time
body: Mr. Hoffman. This letter serves as official notice from the Yakima County Superior Court regarding your pending water rights petition against Peters Farms Ltd. Filing deadline Sunday October 25 2026 at 11:59 PM Pacific Time. The complete petition packet must be filed with the Superior Court Clerk Office at 128 North Second Street Yakima WA 98901. Please note this date supersedes any earlier date you may have received from the WSU Extension office ServiceNow ticketing system. That system generated an interim tracking date of October 20 2026 which reflects an administrative logging step only. Amelia Torres Yakima County Superior Court Clerk.
